groups.description:
__ _2024 General Election data are expected to be published to this directory in February 2025_ __

The data from each election in this directory are reported by 2024 primary election voter tabulation districts (VTDs). VTDs are geographic approximations of voting precincts and are used to provide links among the census geography used to build districts, census population data, and election data. The [_Comprehensive Election Datasets_](https://data.capitol.texas.gov/dataset/comprehensive-election-datasets-compressed-format) resource provides a compressed file with all available election data reported by the 2024 primary election VTDs, as well as compressed files with all available data reported by each earlier vintage of VTDs from this decade.

GIS users can join the election data to the [_2024 Primary Election VTDs Shapefile_](https://data.capitol.texas.gov/dataset/vtds). Use the common field name 'VTDKEY' to join the data.

These datasets are developed and compiled by  the Research Division of the Texas Legislative Council for redistricting purposes. There may be small differences between the data presented here and official election results; official results should be obtained from the [_Texas Secretary of State_](https://www.sos.state.tx.us/elections/index.shtml) and [_county election officials_](https://www.sos.state.tx.us/elections/voter/county.shtml).

The [_Data for 2021 Redistricting in Texas_](https://redistricting.capitol.texas.gov/docs/pubs/data_for_2021_redistricting.pdf) publication provides more information about the council's collection of election data.
